# @form-eng/designer

> Visual drag-and-drop form builder for @form-eng/core. Outputs valid IFormConfig v2 JSON. HTML5 native DnD, undo/redo, rule builder with all 15 condition operators + AND/OR/NOT.

- Docs: [README](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/designer/README.md)
- Agent instructions: [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/bghcore/form-engine/tree/main/packages/designer/AGENTS.md)
- npm: [@form-eng/designer](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@form-eng/designer)
- License: MIT
- Peer dependencies: `react`, `react-dom`, `@form-eng/core`

## API Surface

### State Management
- `DesignerProvider` -- React context provider wrapping useReducer with undo/redo (50-snapshot stack)
- `useDesigner()` -- Hook returning state + action helpers + `exportConfig()` -> `IFormConfig`
- `designerReducer` -- Reducer handling 16 action types
- `createInitialDesignerState()` -- Factory for empty designer state

### Components
- `FormDesigner` -- Main layout with 5 tabs (Design, Rules, Wizard, Preview, Import/Export). Props: `style`, `className`
- `FieldPalette` -- Draggable field type grid organized in 4 groups (Input, Selection, Layout, Read Only)
- `FormCanvas` -- Drop zone with field cards. Supports palette drops (new fields) and canvas reorder. Click to select, hover to delete
- `FieldConfigPanel` -- Property editor with 4 tabs: General (label, type, required, hidden, readOnly, defaultValue), Options (value/label pairs), Validation (name/message/params rules), Config (JSON textarea)
- `RuleBuilder` -- Condition builder with all 15 operators + AND/OR/NOT grouping. Effect editor for required/hidden/readOnly/component/computedValue. Rule ID and priority fields
- `ConfigPreview` -- Live JSON preview of current IFormConfig with clipboard copy button
- `WizardConfigurator` -- Enable/disable wizard, add/remove steps, assign fields to steps, linearNavigation/validateOnStepChange/saveOnStepChange options
- `ImportExport` -- Import via paste or file upload (validates v2 format), export as JSON file download

### Types
- `IDesignerState` -- Full designer state (selectedFieldId, fields, fieldOrder, wizard, settings, isDirty, undoStack, redoStack)
- `IDesignerSnapshot` -- Snapshot for undo/redo stack
- `IDesignerAction` -- Union of 16 action types
- `DesignerActionType` -- Action type enum
- `IDesignerContextValue` -- Context value (state + dispatch)
- `IDesignerProviderProps` -- Provider props
- `IUseDesigner` -- Return type of useDesigner hook
- `IFormDesignerProps` -- FormDesigner component props

### CSS Custom Properties
- `--designer-primary`, `--designer-bg`, `--designer-surface`, `--designer-font-family`

## Code Example

```tsx
import { DesignerProvider, FormDesigner, useDesigner } from "@form-eng/designer";
import "@form-eng/designer/dist/styles.css";

function SaveButton() {
  const { exportConfig, state } = useDesigner();
  return (
    <button onClick={() => {
      const config = exportConfig(); // valid IFormConfig v2
      console.log(JSON.stringify(config, null, 2));
    }} disabled={!state.isDirty}>
      Save Form
    </button>
  );
}

function App() {
  return (
    <DesignerProvider>
      <FormDesigner style={{ height: "100vh" }} />
      <SaveButton />
    </DesignerProvider>
  );
}
```
